docs.title: AgentOS
docs.text:
Local-first AI agents for your workflow — private, powerful, and fully customizable. Your data never leaves your machine. You choose the model, the prompt, the tools. No vendor lock-in.

Download Latest Release Get Started

docs.title: What is AgentOS?
docs.text:
AgentOS is an AI-powered agent platform that runs entirely on your machine. It connects to your development tools — GitHub, Jira, Slack, and more — synthesizes everything into a premium intelligence dashboard, and lets you interact with your projects through natural language.

100% Private & Secure

All your project data, chat conversations, and configurations stay on your local machine. The only external communication is for licensing validation, bug reports, feedback, and anonymized usage statistics — never your project data.

docs.title: How It Works
docs.text:
1 Download

Choose your flavour and install with one command — or just double-click the included launcher script.

2 Configure

Configuration is optional — skip the CLI and go straight to the Web UI Settings to connect your agents and tools in seconds.

3 Interact

AgentOS is live at localhost:18080. Your project intelligence is ready for natural language chat.

docs.title: 🤖 AI Copilot
docs.text: Streaming chat with Ollama (local), OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini. Persistent memory that learns your preferences. AI Copilot →

docs.title: 📊 Smart Dashboard
docs.text: 24-card bento-grid: KPIs, Risk Radar, Velocity, Gantt, Heatmaps, Sprint Status, and more — all drag-and-drop. Dashboard →

docs.title: 🐙 Multi-Source Sync
docs.text: Aggregate GitHub repos and Jira boards in one view. Track PRs, commits, issues, and contributor velocity.

docs.title: 🔒 Local-First Privacy
docs.text: Runs on YOUR machine. Data sovereignty by design. SQLite storage, no cloud sync mandatory. Security →

docs.title: ⚡ Action Chain
docs.text: Watch your AI agent work. Tool calls visualized as an expanding chain with per-step timing and outputs.

docs.title: 🛸 Fleet View
docs.text: Multi-project health overview — all projects ranked by risk score. Perfect for engineering managers.

docs.title: Flavours — One Engine, Many Agents
docs.text:
AgentOS is built on a flavour system — each flavour is a specialized AI agent persona with its own personality, tools, and visual DNA. All use the same commands: agentos serve, agentos chat, etc.

🎩 🛒 🏢 
# Install a specific flavour:
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh -s -- --flavour pm
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh -s -- --flavour retail
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh -s -- --flavour office

docs.title: Jean-Pierre — The PM
docs.text: AI Project Management copilot. GitHub + Jira + Slack intelligence. Risk identification and sprint management. Binary: agentos-pm · Status: ✅ Available Learn more →

docs.title: Retail Ops
docs.text: Inventory tracking, order management, and retail analytics AI assistant. Binary: agentos-retail · Status: ✅ Available

docs.title: Office Assistant
docs.text: Document management, scheduling, and workflow automation for office productivity. Binary: agentos-office · Status: ✅ Available

docs.title: 🔓 No Vendor Lock-In — Full Control
docs.text:
AgentOS puts you in charge of your intelligence infrastructure:

  • 🤖 Choose your AI model — Ollama (local), OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini. Switch anytime.
  • 📝 Customize prompts — Full control over system prompts and agent behavior.
  • 🧰 Pick your tools — Enable only what is necessary for your workflow.
  • 📂 Own your data — Standard SQLite storage. Export anytime. We never touch it.

docs.title: 🔒 Privacy & Data Security
docs.text:
🔒 Your data stays on your machine

AgentOS was designed with a privacy-first architecture:

Data Type Storage Leaves Your Machine? Project Data (Commits, PRs, etc) Local SQLite ❌ Never Chat Conversations Local SQLite ❌ Never Agent Memory Local SQLite ❌ Never API Keys & Tokens Local Config ❌ Never

All communication with UnicoLab Watchtower is limited to license validation and anonymous feature metrics.

Learn more about our security model →

docs.title: 🧪 R&D Testing Program — Try It Free
docs.text:
License Required

AgentOS requires a valid license key to operate. To get a free testing license, contact our team at info@unicolab.ai.

AgentOS is an experimental AI platform — an autonomous compute node for advanced project management. We are offering free access to the PM flavor (Jean-Pierre) during the public beta.

docs.title: How to get started:
docs.text:
1. Download your preferred flavour from the official releases page
  2. Email info@unicolab.ai to request your activation key.
  3. Launch — double-click the included launcher or run agentos serve. See the Quick Start Guide.

Download AgentOS Email for Key

docs.title: Jean-Pierre — Your AI Project Manager
docs.text:
Stop context-switching. Start making decisions. Jean-Pierre connects your dev tools, synthesizes live intelligence, and tells you what needs your attention — before you even ask.

Install in 10 Seconds See What It Does

docs.title: The Problem
docs.text:
Every week, project managers lose 10+ hours to:

Activity Time Wasted Why Gathering status from GitHub, Jira, Slack ~3 hours Context-switching between 5+ tools Preparing for standup + sprint meetings ~2 hours Manually aggregating data Answering "what's the status?" questions ~2 hours No single source of truth Identifying risks and blockers ~2 hours Reactive, not proactive Writing reports and summaries ~2 hours Copy-paste from multiple sources

Jean-Pierre eliminates all of this.

docs.title: A Living Intelligence Dashboard
docs.text:
Not a static dashboard — a living, breathing project surface. Jean-Pierre's orbital view puts the agent at the center of your project universe, with live metrics orbiting around it:

Real-Time HealthProactive AlertsSprint IntelligenceTeam Visibility

A continuously-updated health score tells you instantly if your project is on track, at risk, or needs immediate attention. No more guessing.

JP detects problems before you notice them: stale PRs, sprint risk, velocity drops, missing reviewers. Click any alert to get an AI-powered action plan.

Live sprint progress, velocity trends, and burn rates — pulled directly from Jira. No manual tracking.

Contributor leaderboard, velocity per developer, PR review patterns — understand your team's capacity at a glance.

Impact

Morning check-in goes from 30 minutes to 30 seconds. Open the dashboard, see the health score, check alerts, done.

docs.title: An AI That Knows Your Projects
docs.text:
JP isn't a generic chatbot. It's an AI that's connected to your live data and understands your projects deeply.

Ask anything:

"Generate a standup report for all projects"

→ JP fetches PRs, commits, sprint data → synthesizes a structured report with risks and action items. ⏱️ 8 seconds.

"Which PRs have been open too long and who should review them?"

→ JP analyzes PR age, checks contributor history, suggests optimal reviewer per PR. ⏱️ 5 seconds.

"What should I focus on today?"

→ JP checks sprint deadlines, scans for urgent items, reviews yesterday's activity → returns a prioritized action list. ⏱️ 6 seconds.

docs.title: One-Click Commands
docs.text:
No typing needed for common workflows:

Command What You Get 📋 Standup Report Structured report with metrics, risks, and action items 🔍 Sprint Status Sprint progress + milestone timeline across all projects 📈 Project Progress Full progress report with trends and recommendations 📝 Meeting Notes Structured minutes with decisions and tracked action items ✅ Smart Tasks AI-prioritized task list based on current project state 📤 Sync to AIFlow Push intelligence to the central platform

Impact

Standup prep goes from 20 minutes to one click. Meeting notes are structured automatically. Sprint reports write themselves.

docs.title: An Agent That Remembers
docs.text:
Tell JP something once — he remembers it across all future conversations:

  • "We use 2-week sprints starting Monday"
  • "Alice is on vacation until the 20th"
  • "The Jira key is INFRA, not BACKEND"
  • "I prefer tables over bullet points"

No configuration needed. JP learns from your conversations and applies this knowledge automatically.

Impact

JP gets smarter with every conversation. No repeat instructions. No re-explaining your team's context.

docs.title: A Strategic Portfolio Board
docs.text:
The Strategic Canvas gives you a visual overview of your entire portfolio:

  • Live project cards with health badges, commit sparklines, and key metrics
  • Smart connections between projects (dependencies, blockers, team sharing)
  • AI analysis that sees cross-project risks invisible in individual dashboards
Without Canvas With Canvas Risks discovered in meetings (too late) AI-detected cross-project risks in real-time Dependencies tracked in spreadsheets Visual dependency map Strategic analysis takes hours One-click AI portfolio analysis

Learn more about Strategic Canvas →

Impact

Portfolio review goes from a 2-hour spreadsheet exercise to a 5-minute visual check. AI spots risks you wouldn't find until the next steering committee.

docs.title: Multi-Project Radar
docs.text:
Managing 5, 10, 20 projects? Fleet View ranks all projects by risk score. Open it at 9am and you know in 10 seconds which projects need your attention today.

Impact

No more checking each project individually. One screen, all projects, highest risk first.

docs.title: Automated Intelligence
docs.text:
JP works even when you don't ask:

  • Morning Brief — auto-generated daily summary: yesterday's activity, today's urgents, current blockers
  • Slack Delivery — standup summaries pushed directly to your team's Slack channel
  • Scheduled Reports — weekly sprint reviews, retrospectives, progress summaries on autopilot

Impact

Your morning routine is automated. Open your laptop, the brief is already there.

docs.title: 100% On-Premise
docs.text: No SaaS. No cloud servers. The binary runs on your machine. Period.

docs.text: All storage is local. Nothing is ever sent to external services.

docs.title: The ROI
docs.text:
Metric Before JP With JP Savings Status gathering 3 hrs/week 0 (automated) 3 hrs/week Meeting prep 2 hrs/week 5 min (one-click) ~2 hrs/week Risk identification Reactive (in meetings) Real-time (proactive alerts) Fewer surprises Report writing 2 hrs/week Automated 2 hrs/week Cross-project visibility Spreadsheets Strategic Canvas Better decisions Total time saved ~10 hrs/week per PM

That's 500+ hours per year per PM

At $75/hour, that's $37,500 in annual productivity gains per project manager.

"Jean-Pierre doesn't just show you data — he understands your projects."

Download Now Installation Guide

Built with ❤️ by UnicoLab · info@unicolab.ai

docs.title: License
docs.text: AgentOS requires a valid license key to operate. Licenses are managed through the Watchtower licensing service by UnicoLab.

docs.title: 🧪 R&D Testing Program — Free Access
docs.text:
License Required

AgentOS will not work without a valid license key. To obtain a free testing license, contact us at info@unicolab.ai.

AgentOS is currently an experimental R&D project — an autonomous compute node for our project management platform solution. We're actively developing and testing it, and there may be bugs as the project is in active research and development.

We're offering free limited access to the PM flavor (Jean-Pierre) in exchange for your feedback:

docs.title: What You Get
docs.text:
• ✅ Free license key for testing — no cost, no commitment
  • ✅ Full access to the Jean-Pierre PM flavor
  • ✅ Priority support from the development team
  • ✅ Direct influence on the product roadmap

docs.title: What We Ask
docs.text:
• 💬 Your feedback — What works? What doesn't? What's missing?
  • 🐛 Bug reports — Help us find and fix issues
  • 💡 Feature suggestions — Tell us what you need

docs.title: How to Get Your License
docs.text:
1. Email info@unicolab.ai with:
    • Your name / organization
    • Your use case (what projects you want to manage)
    • Your platform (macOS / Linux / Windows)
  2. We'll send you a .watchtower.json license file within 24 hours
  3. Place it next to your agentos binary and you're ready to go!

docs.title: License Setup
docs.text: Once you receive your .watchtower.json file:

docs.title: Option 1: License File (Recommended)
docs.text:
Place the .watchtower.json file in the same directory as your agentos binary:

{
  "url": "https://watchtower.unicolab.io",
  "license_key": "xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx",
  "kid": "wt_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "secret": "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "credential_id": "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "deployment_mode": "floating"
}

docs.title: Option 2: Environment Variables
docs.text:
export WATCHTOWER_LICENSE_KEY="xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx"
export WATCHTOWER_KID="wt_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"
export WATCHTOWER_SECRET="xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx"

docs.title: Option 3: Setup Wizard
docs.text: Run agentos setup and enter your credentials when prompted.

docs.title: Check License Status
docs.text:
$ agentos license

🟢 License Status: enterprise (active)
   Seats: 3 / 10
   Expires: 2027-01-01
   Features: all

docs.title: No Vendor Lock-In
docs.text:
AgentOS gives you full control:

  • 🤖 Choose your AI model — Use Ollama (free, local), OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini. Switch anytime.
  • 📝 Customize prompts — Full control over the system prompt and agent behavior
  • 🧰 Choose your tools — Enable only the integrations you need
  • 📂 Own your data — Everything stored locally in standard SQLite. Export anytime.
  • 🔧 Extensible — The flavor system lets you adapt the agent to any use case

You're never locked into a specific AI provider, model, or workflow. AgentOS is a base engine that you control.

docs.title: Privacy Notice
docs.text:
License validation communicates only:

  • Your license key (to verify it's valid)
  • App version (to check for updates)
  • Seat count (to enforce seat limits)

No project data, conversations, or personal information is ever transmitted. See our full Security & Privacy page.

docs.title: Security & Privacy
docs.text:
🔒 Your data stays on your machine

Local-first AI agents for your workflow — private, powerful, and fully customizable. Your data never leaves your machine. You choose the model, the prompt, the tools.

docs.title: Our Privacy Promise
docs.text: Your data stays on YOUR machine. AgentOS runs entirely locally — all project data, conversations, memories, and configurations are stored in an encrypted SQLite database on your computer. There is no cloud backend, no shared server, and no telemetry on your project data.

docs.title: 📂 Project Data
docs.text: Commits, PRs, issues, and sprint data are stored locally. Fetched via encrypted API calls directly to GitHub/Jira — the same calls your browser makes.

docs.title: 💬 Chat History
docs.text: All your conversations with Jean-Pierre are stored in your local SQLite database. 100% private. No cloud logging.

docs.title: 🧠 Agent Memory
docs.text: Your preferences, learned facts, team structures, and corrections stay local. Memory is persisted in the same encrypted store.

docs.title: 📝 Meeting Notes
docs.text: All AI-generated meeting minutes, action items, and follow-ups are stored locally. Your meeting intelligence is yours alone.

docs.title: 🔐 Encryption & Password Security
docs.text:
AgentOS takes data protection seriously at every layer:

🗄️ 🔑 🔒 🛡️

docs.title: Encrypted Storage
docs.text: All data is stored in an encrypted SQLite database on your local file system. Project metrics, conversations, memories, and meeting notes are protected at rest.

docs.title: API Key Security
docs.text: All API keys and tokens are stored in your local ~/.agentos/config.yaml. They are masked in the UI, transmitted only to their respective services over TLS-encrypted channels, and never logged or sent to UnicoLab.

docs.title: Zero Cloud Storage
docs.text: There is no UnicoLab server that stores your data. No cloud database, no S3 buckets, no analytics pipelines processing your project metrics. Everything computes and persists locally.

docs.title: Secure Connections
docs.text: All external API calls (GitHub, Jira, Slack, AI providers) use TLS-encrypted HTTPS channels. No data is transmitted in plain text. Connections are direct — no proxy or middleman.

docs.title: External Communication
docs.text:
Only specific, limited communications leave your machine:

🔑 🤖 🐙 📊

docs.title: License Validation
docs.text: Periodic check with UnicoLab Watchtower to verify your subscription. No project data is transmitted — only your license key.

docs.title: AI Provider
docs.text: Only if using cloud APIs (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini). Ollama is 100% local — your prompts never leave your machine.

docs.title: Tool Sync
docs.text: Direct encrypted calls to GitHub/Jira APIs — the same connections your browser makes. No data is routed through UnicoLab.

docs.title: Metrics
docs.text: Anonymized feature usage statistics to help us improve the engine. Never your project data, conversations, or code.

docs.title: 📐 Architecture Design
docs.text: AgentOS is built as a self-contained autonomous compute node. The single binary embeds the entire web UI, AI engine, tool system, and database — requiring no external server, no Docker, and no complex infrastructure to operate.

docs.title: 🚀 Scalability — Zero Bottlenecks
docs.text:
Built for Any Team Size

Since AgentOS runs fully locally on each user's machine, there are no scalability bottlenecks — whether you have 1 user or 1,000 users in your organization.

Traditional project management platforms hit scaling walls: database overload, API rate limits, server capacity, and infrastructure costs that grow with every new seat. AgentOS eliminates all of these problems by design.

Concern Traditional SaaS AgentOS Server Load Shared server — degrades with users ❌ No server — each instance is independent Database Bottleneck Central DB — queries slow down at scale ❌ Local SQLite — each user has their own API Rate Limits Team shares one API allocation ❌ Each user authenticates independently Infrastructure Cost Grows linearly with team size ❌ Zero server cost — runs on existing hardware Downtime Risk One server down = everyone blocked ❌ Fully independent — no single point of failure Data Migration Complex multi-tenant migrations ❌ Self-contained — nothing to migrate

Each AgentOS instance is a fully autonomous compute node. Adding a new team member means downloading a binary — not provisioning infrastructure. Your 500th user gets the exact same performance as your first user.

Enterprise Coordination

Need centralized intelligence across all instances? Connect AgentOS to AIFlow as a sync hub. Each agent stays fast and independent, while AIFlow aggregates insights at the organization level.

docs.title: Questions?
docs.text:
If you have any security concerns or questions about our data handling, please reach out to our security team.

Email Security Open GitHub Issue

docs.title: 🤖 AI Copilot
docs.text: Your personal AI assistant that understands your projects, remembers your preferences, and helps you make better decisions.

docs.title: ⚡ Streaming Chat
docs.text: Talk to your agent in natural language. See responses render in real-time with rich markdown support.

docs.title: ⛓️ Action Chain
docs.text: Watch exactly how your agent works. Tool calls are visualized as an expanding chain with full transparency.

docs.title: 🧠 JP Memory
docs.text: Auto-learning facts and preferences. Tell Jean-Pierre once, and he'll remember it across all future sessions.

docs.title: 🛸 Context Aware
docs.text: Your agent is deeply synchronized with your current view, whether you're looking at a specific PR or the risk radar.

docs.title: Smart Memory System
docs.text:
AgentOS includes JP Memory — an autonomous long-term memory system:

  • 📝 Fact Extraction — Automatically saves team structures, priorities, and project nuances.
  • 🔄 Auto-correction — Correct a fact once, and the agent updates its internal knowledge graph.
  • 📦 Local Storage — No vector database is sent to the cloud. Everything stays in your SQLite DB.

Manage Memories

Press ++cmd+m++ to view the memory dashboard. You can manually edit, delete, or add permanent facts to your agent's brain.

docs.title: Ollama
docs.text: 100% Local. Free. Maximum Privacy. Set up Ollama →

docs.title: OpenAI
docs.text: GPT-4o / GPT-4 Turbo. Cloud-based. Connect OpenAI →

docs.title: Anthropic
docs.text: Claude 3.5 Sonnet / Opus. Superior reasoning. Connect Anthropic →

docs.title: Gemini
docs.text: Fast, large context windows. Connect Gemini →

docs.title: Strategic Canvas
docs.text: See your entire portfolio at a glance. Live project health, smart dependency mapping, and AI-powered strategic recommendations — all on one visual board.

docs.title: Why It Matters
docs.text:
Managing multiple projects means juggling fragmented views across GitHub, Jira, and spreadsheets. The Strategic Canvas gives you something you've never had before: a single visual board where every project shows real-time health and you can map relationships between them.

The Value

  • Cut status meeting prep from 30 minutes to 30 seconds
  • Spot cross-project risks that are invisible in individual dashboards
  • Get AI recommendations based on the full portfolio picture

docs.title: Live Project Cards
docs.text:
Drop any project onto the canvas — it instantly shows live data:

  • Health Badge — Healthy, At Risk, or Critical — auto-scored from your live PR, issue, and sprint data
  • Commit Sparkline — 7-day activity trend at a glance
  • Key Metrics — Open PRs · Issues · Sprint Progress · Commit Count

No manual data entry. No stale screenshots. Always live.

docs.title: Smart Connections
docs.text:
Map how your projects relate to each other:

Relationship What It Reveals depends on Hidden dependency chains that create risk blocks Active blockers across project boundaries shares team Resource conflicts and capacity risks data flow Integration points that need attention

Risk Discovery

When you connect two at-risk projects as "depends on", JP immediately highlights the cascading risk — something you'd never see in separate Jira boards.

docs.title: AI-Powered Strategic Insight
docs.text:
Click 🧠 Analyze with JP and Jean-Pierre sees the full picture: every project, its health, every connection. He delivers:

  • Cross-project risk assessment — risks that only exist when you zoom out
  • Dependency analysis — is a critical project depending on one that's already at risk?
  • Resource insights — team conflicts between connected projects
  • Action items — concrete next steps, not vague advice

docs.title: Portfolio Health At a Glance
docs.text:
The portfolio health donut shows the distribution of healthy, at-risk, and critical projects. KPI cards auto-populate with aggregated metrics across your entire portfolio.

See immediately: "3 projects healthy, 1 at risk, 1 critical. Overall health: 72%."

docs.title: Templates — Start in Seconds
docs.text: Template Best For Portfolio Overview Weekly leadership check-in — all projects + KPIs + AI summary Risk Matrix Steering committee — projects grouped by risk level Sprint Dashboard Sprint planning — velocity and sprint health across teams

docs.title: The Bottom Line
docs.text: Without Canvas With Canvas Separate dashboards per project One visual board, all projects Dependencies tracked in spreadsheets Visual dependency map with typed relationships Risks discovered in meetings (too late) AI-detected cross-project risks in real-time Manual status aggregation Auto-populated live metrics Strategic analysis takes hours One-click AI analysis of entire portfolio

docs.title: 📊 Project Dashboard
docs.text:
A 24-card, drag-and-drop bento-grid dashboard that gives you a complete picture of your project at a glance.

View Jean-Pierre Flavor →

docs.title: The Command Center
docs.text: Every card is draggable, resizable, and interactive. Click any card's "Ask JP" button to get an instant AI analysis of that specific metric.

docs.title: 📈 Risk Radar
docs.text: 0–100 risk score calculated from stale PRs, low velocity, and sprint lag.

docs.title: 🏗️ Velocity Charts
docs.text: 8-week stacked author velocity and contribution heatmaps.

docs.title: 📅 Smart Gantt
docs.text: Auto-generated timelines derived from real PR activity and sprint data.

docs.title: 🎯 Action Center
docs.text: Centralized risk assessment with AI-recommended next steps and task lists.

docs.title: Dynamic Card Library
docs.text: Card Description 📊 KPIs Open PRs, issues, commits, stars — dynamic labels based on range 🔀 Pull Requests Live PR list with AI-powered reviewer suggestions 🧩 Sprint Status Jira metrics visualized as progress rings (WIP vs Done) 🗺️ Mind Map Visual dependency graph of Jira issues and epics 🏆 Leaderboard Gamified team contribution metrics with streaks and badges 🕐 Activity Feed Reverse-chronological timeline of all project events

docs.title: 👽 Living View Mode
docs.text:
Toggle between two distinct visual experiences:

Pro Tip

Hover over the Jean-Pierre avatar in the center of the orbital view to see his current "mood" based on project health scores.

docs.title: 🧱 Classic Bento
docs.text: Traditional card grid. Best for dense information review and dashboard building.

docs.title: 🫧 Living Orbital
docs.text: An animated, immersive view with Jean-Pierre at the center. Widgets orbit the agent as interactive nodes.

docs.title: Keyboard Mastery
docs.text:
Press ++cmd+k++ anytime to open the Command Palette.

Action Shortcut Refresh Data ++cmd+r++ Search Engine ++cmd+k++ Toggle Sidebar ++cmd+b++ Agent Settings ++cmd+comma++

docs.title: Fleet View
docs.text: Monitor all your projects at once — a multi-project health overview ranked by risk score.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Fleet View gives managers a bird's-eye view of all tracked projects. Each project shows:

  • Health Score — AI-calculated from PR activity, sprint progress, and team velocity
  • Risk Level — Color-coded: 🟢 Low · 🟡 Medium · 🔴 High
  • Key Metrics — Open PRs, active sprint items, recent commits
  • Quick Actions — Jump to dashboard, ask JP, or trigger a report

docs.title: Use Cases
docs.text:
• Engineering Managers — Monitor 5–20 repos across teams at a glance
  • CTOs — Executive overview of all active projects
  • Tech Leads — Identify which projects need attention this week
  • Freelancers — Manage multiple client projects from one hub

docs.title: Accessing Fleet View
docs.text: Click Fleet in the sidebar, or press ++cmd+k++ and type "fleet".

docs.title: Integrations
docs.text: AgentOS connects to your existing development tools to aggregate project intelligence.

docs.title: GitHub
docs.text:
Multi-repository support with deep analytics:

  • Pull Requests — Status, reviewers, AI-powered reviewer suggestions
  • Commits — Activity charts, per-author breakdown, trend analysis
  • Issues — Tracking with labels and priority
  • Contributors — Activity metrics, velocity, leaderboard
  • Webhooks — Real-time push events

Setup Guide →

docs.title: Jira
docs.text:
Multi-board aggregation for sprint and project tracking:

  • Sprint Status — WIP, Done, Todo ring charts
  • Issues — By type, priority, label, and epic
  • Epic Tracker — Progress bars per epic
  • Mind Map — Visual issue hierarchy
  • Sprint Planner — AI-generated sprint plans

Setup Guide →

docs.title: Slack
docs.text:
Send reports and standup summaries to your team channels:

  • Standup Reports — One-click send to Slack
  • Notifications — Alert channels about risks and blockers

Setup Guide →

docs.title: AIFlow Platform
docs.text:
Sync project intelligence with the centralized AIFlow platform:

  • Push Reports — Share insights with your team
  • Multi-agent Orchestration — Connect to AIFlow's agentic workflows
  • Centralized Dashboard — View all projects across the organization

Setup Guide →

docs.title: AgentOS Flavours
docs.text: AgentOS is built on a flavour system — each flavour is a specialized AI agent persona with its own personality, tools, dashboard configuration, and use case. Each flavour is a separate binary that you download and run.

docs.title: One Engine, Many Agents
docs.text: A flavour is a tailored experience that transforms the base AgentOS engine into a specialized assistant. All flavours share the same commands (agentos serve, agentos chat, etc.) and the same powerful engine.

docs.title: 🤖 Agent Persona
docs.text: Name, personality, communication style, and specialized system prompt.

docs.title: 🧰 Available Tools
docs.text: Which integrations and capabilities are enabled for the agent.

docs.title: 📊 Dashboard Layout
docs.text: A custom bento-grid layout tailored to the flavour's specific data sources.

docs.title: ⚡ Quick Actions
docs.text: One-click workflows and prompts tailored to the industry or role.

docs.title: Jean-Pierre — The PM
docs.text: AI Project Management copilot. GitHub + Jira + Slack intelligence. Binary: agentos-pm · Status: ✅ Available Learn more →

docs.title: Retail Ops
docs.text: Inventory, orders, shift management, and retail analytics assistant. Binary: agentos-retail · Status: ✅ Available

docs.title: Office Assistant
docs.text: Document management, scheduling, and workflow automation. Binary: agentos-office · Status: ✅ Available

docs.title: ⚡ Installing a Flavour
docs.text:
Each flavour is installed with the same one-line command — just specify which one:

macOS / LinuxWindows 
# Jean-Pierre PM (default)
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh

# Retail Ops
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh -s -- --flavour retail

# Office Assistant
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh -s -- --flavour office

# Download the installer
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.bat -o install.bat

# Jean-Pierre PM (default)
.\install.bat

# Retail Ops
.\install.bat --flavour retail

Binary is always called agentos

The installer automatically renames the per-flavour binary to agentos (or agentos.exe). All commands work the same regardless of flavour: agentos serve, agentos chat, agentos setup.

docs.title: 🖱️ Double-Click Launchers
docs.text:
Every download includes launcher scripts so you can start AgentOS without opening a terminal:

Platform File Action macOS Start AgentOS.command Double-click in Finder — clears Gatekeeper, opens browser Windows Start AgentOS.bat Double-click in Explorer — opens browser Linux start-agentos.sh Make executable, double-click in file manager

docs.title: 🎨 Custom Flavours
docs.text:
The AgentOS flavour system is designed to be fully extensible. We can create specialized agents for any role, industry, or complex workflow.

Enterprise Customization

Need a custom flavour for your organization? We can build tailored agents that connect to your proprietary tools and data sources. Contact us to discuss your needs.

docs.title: Jean-Pierre — The AI PM Copilot 🎩
docs.text:
"I don't just show you data — I understand your projects."

Jean-Pierre is the Project Management flavor of AgentOS — a local-first AI copilot that connects your GitHub, Jira, and documentation into one real-time, intelligent command center for every project you manage.

Download AgentOS Quick Start

docs.title: The Problem
docs.text: Project managers juggle 5–10 tools daily. Context-switching between GitHub, Jira, Docs, Slack, and spreadsheets wastes 30% of productive time. Critical signals get buried in notification noise. No single view tells you: "How is my project actually doing?"

docs.title: The Solution
docs.text: Jean-Pierre eliminates the noise. He connects to your GitHub repos, Jira boards, and team channels — synthesizes everything into a premium intelligence dashboard — and generates boardroom-ready reports, risk analyses, and sprint plans on the fly. All through natural language. All running locally on your machine.

docs.title: 🎯 Risk Radar
docs.text: Real-time 0–100 risk score computed from stale PRs, no-reviewer PRs, low velocity, sprint lag, and open blockers. Spot trouble before it becomes a crisis.

docs.title: 🧠 JP Memory
docs.text: Autonomous long-term memory. Jean-Pierre auto-extracts facts, team structures, preferences, and corrections from every conversation. He learns and improves with every interaction.

docs.title: 🎯 Action Center
docs.text: Centralized risks, AI-generated recommendations, and a checkable task list with real-time progress tracking. Your cockpit for what to do next.

docs.title: 📅 Sprint Planner
docs.text: JP generates data-driven sprint plans from live Jira + GitHub backlog data. Refine tasks interactively, adjust scope — plan smarter, ship faster.

docs.title: 📊 Command Center Dashboard
docs.text: A 24-card, drag-and-drop bento-grid dashboard gives you a complete picture of every project at a glance. Every card is interactive — click "Ask JP" on any widget for instant AI analysis.

docs.title: 📈 Velocity Charts
docs.text: 8-week stacked bar charts of commits per author. Spot slowdowns and capacity issues instantly.

docs.title: 🌡️ Contribution Heatmap
docs.text: 26-week contribution heatmap per author — understand commit intensity and engagement patterns at a glance.

docs.title: 📅 Smart Gantt
docs.text: Auto-generated timelines derived from real PR activity and sprint data. Interactive filter tabs and proper empty states.

docs.title: 🏆 Team Leaderboard
docs.text: Gamified contributor ranking — commit streaks, PR merge rate, and badges (🔥🥇👑). Celebrate your top performers.

docs.title: 🗺️ Mind Map
docs.text: Visual dependency graph of Jira issues, epics, and relationships. See the big picture of your project structure.

docs.title: 📊 KPI Cards
docs.text: Open PRs, issues, commits, stars — dynamic labels that auto-adapt based on the selected date range.

docs.title: GitHub
docs.text: Multi-repo: PRs, commits, issues, contributor activity, webhooks — aggregate across all repos into one view. Setup Guide →

docs.title: Jira
docs.text: Multi-board: sprint status, issue tracking, backlog management — aggregated across all configured boards. Setup Guide →

docs.title: Slack
docs.text: One-click standup reports posted directly to any Slack channel via webhook. Keep your team in the loop without lifting a finger. Setup Guide →

docs.title: AIFlow Sync
docs.text: Connect to AIFlow for centralized intelligence, advanced analytics, and multi-agent orchestration across your organization. Learn More →

docs.title: ⌘K Command Palette
docs.text: Spotlight-style search across all commands. Navigate, trigger actions, ask AI — all from a single keyboard shortcut.

docs.title: 💡 Quick Prompts
docs.text: 6 one-click PM prompt pills — blockers, bottlenecks, sprint health, standup report, risk analysis, and more. Instant answers.

docs.title: 📝 Meeting Notes
docs.text: AI-generated meeting minutes with structured action item tracking, searchable meeting history, and follow-up management.

docs.title: 📰 Daily Brief
docs.text: Automated 9AM project summaries — or generate on demand. Every morning starts with a clear picture of the day.

docs.title: 📄 PDF Export
docs.text: Export any dashboard to PDF — pixel-perfect reports ready for stakeholder meetings and executive reviews.

docs.title: 📝 Project Notes
docs.text: Auto-saving markdown scratchpad per project. Persisted locally, always available. Your project's living notebook.

docs.title: 🛸 Fleet View — Multi-Project Command
docs.text: Managing multiple projects? Fleet View gives you a bird's-eye overview with all projects ranked by risk score. Instantly identify which projects need attention, drill down into any project, and compare health metrics across your entire portfolio.

docs.title: ⛓️ Action Chain — Full Transparency
docs.text:
Watch exactly how Jean-Pierre works. Every tool call is visualized as an expanding chain with:

  • 🔧 Tool arguments displayed as formatted JSON
  • 📤 Full output from each step
  • ⏱️ Per-step timing so you can see how long each operation took

No black boxes. Complete transparency into every AI decision.

docs.title: Quick Actions
docs.text:
Jean-Pierre comes with pre-configured one-click workflows tailored for Project Managers:

Action What it does 📊 List Projects Show all tracked projects with repos and Jira keys 📋 Standup Report Generate a structured standup with metrics and risks 🔍 Sprint Status Current sprint progress across all projects 📈 Project Progress Commit activity, sprint metrics, milestones, risks 🏗️ Sprint Burndown Task completion timeline and analysis 📅 Sprint Planner AI-generated sprint plans from live backlog data 🎯 Action Center Centralized risks and AI-recommended next steps 📤 Sync to AIFlow Push comprehensive report to AIFlow platform 📝 New Meeting Note Create structured meeting minutes with action items 📋 Meeting Actions Show all open action items from meetings 💬 Slack Standup Post standup report to Slack channel 📰 Daily Brief Generate automated project summary

docs.title: 🏗️ Structured Intelligence
docs.text:
Jean-Pierre doesn't just output text. He generates interactive, data-rich components from your live project data:

  • :::report — Deep-dive standups with velocity metrics and risk breakdown
  • :::milestones — Visual release timelines and key tracking dates
  • :::gantt — Live sprint task breakdowns and burndown analysis

docs.title: 🔒 Private by Design
docs.text:
Jean-Pierre runs entirely on your machine. Conversations, project data, meeting notes, and memories — everything stays local in an encrypted SQLite database. No cloud storage, no third-party analytics. Your project intelligence is yours alone.

Learn more about our security model →

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text:
AI Provider Setup — Ollama (local), OpenAI, Anthropic, or Gemini

Source Control Sync — Multi-repo aggregation

Sprint Tracking — Multi-board synchronization

docs.title: Who is it for?
docs.text: Download AgentOS Request Invite

docs.title: 👨‍💼 Engineering Managers
docs.text: Real-time team velocity, PR throughput, contribution heatmaps, and risk radar for every project in your portfolio.

docs.title: 📋 Technical PMs
docs.text: Automated reporting, sprint planning, cross-team coordination, and boardroom-ready executive summaries in seconds.

docs.title: 💻 Freelance Developers
docs.text: Manage multiple client project hubs with ease. Fleet View keeps every project at your fingertips.

docs.title: 🚀 Startup CTOs
docs.text: Enterprise-grade project intelligence on your local machine — without the enterprise price tag.

docs.title: ⚙️ Configuration
docs.text:
AgentOS is built to be flexible. All your settings are stored locally on your machine, and you can manage them either through the Web UI or by editing config files directly.

Installation Guide Security & Privacy

docs.title: Web UI Dashboard
docs.text: The premium way to configure your agents. Press ++cmd+comma++ anywhere in the app to open the Settings panel.

docs.title: Setup Wizard
docs.text: Run agentos setup in your terminal for a guided CLI walkthrough (optional).

docs.title: Raw Config
docs.text: Edit ~/.agentos/config.yaml or projects.yaml for advanced automation and scriptability.

docs.title: AI Provider Settings
docs.text: Configure your primary LLM source. You can switch providers instantly without data loss.

docs.title: 🤖 Ollama (Free & Local)
docs.text:
The gold standard for privacy. 

ollama_model: llama3.2:latest
ollama_url: http://localhost:11434
Ollama Setup →

docs.title: ☁️ OpenAI
docs.text:
Classic high-performance. 

openai_api_key: sk-proj-...
openai_model: gpt-4o

docs.title: ✨ Anthropic
docs.text:
Superior PM reasoning. 

anthropic_api_key: sk-ant-...
anthropic_model: claude-3-5-sonnet

docs.title: 🌐 Google Gemini
docs.text:
Huge context windows. 

gemini_api_key: AIza...
gemini_model: gemini-2.0-flash

docs.title: Project Tracking
docs.text:
Define your projects in ~/.agentos/projects.yaml. A single project can aggregate data from multiple repositories and boards.

projects:
  - name: Core Platform
    id: core-platform
    color: "#7C3AED"
    github:
      repos:
        - myorg/frontend
        - myorg/backend
      days_to_fetch: 30
    jira:
      - project_key: ENG
        board_id: 101
    tags:
      - critical
      - v1.0

GUI Management

You don't need to touch YAML to manage projects. Use the Projects view in the Web UI to add, edit, or color-code your workspaces with a few clicks.

docs.title: 🔑 License & Identity
docs.text:
License credentials can be provided via a .watchtower.json file placed next to the agentos binary:

{
  "url": "https://watchtower.unicolab.io",
  "license_key": "AGENT-XXXX-XXXX",
  "kid": "credential-id",
  "secret": "credential-secret"
}

Alternatively, set them as environment variables: WATCHTOWER_LICENSE_KEY, WATCHTOWER_KID, WATCHTOWER_SECRET.

docs.title: Server Customization
docs.text:
Setting Default Description port 18080 Local HTTP server port host 0.0.0.0 Bind address (use 127.0.0.1 for extra security) auto_open true Automatically open your browser on startup storage_path ~/.agentos Base directory for DB and configuration

Connect GitHub → Connect Jira →

docs.title: 🛠️ Installation
docs.text:
Getting AgentOS running on your machine takes one command.

Download Latest Release Quick Start Guide

docs.title: ⚡ One-Line Install (Recommended)
docs.text:
The fastest way to get started on macOS or Linux. This script auto-detects your OS and architecture, downloads the correct flavour binary, renames it to agentos, and installs it to your PATH:

# Default: installs Jean-Pierre (PM copilot)
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh

# Choose a different flavour:
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh -s -- --flavour retail
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh -s -- --flavour office

Available Flavours

Flavour Description pm (default) Jean-Pierre — AI Project Management Copilot retail Retail Operations Assistant office Office Productivity Assistant

That's it! After installation, just run agentos serve and you're live. 🎉 The binary is always called agentos regardless of flavour.

docs.title: 🏗️ Supported Platforms
docs.text:
All architectures are pre-built and available on the Releases Page.

Each flavour has its own archive. Choose the one that matches your role:

Flavour Platform Archive Pattern 🎩 PM macOS arm64 / amd64, Linux agentos-pm_v*_{os}_{arch}.tar.gz 🛒 Retail macOS arm64 / amd64, Linux agentos-retail_v*_{os}_{arch}.tar.gz 🏢 Office macOS arm64 / amd64, Linux agentos-office_v*_{os}_{arch}.tar.gz

Not sure which macOS version?

Run uname -m in Terminal. arm64 = Apple Silicon, x86_64 = Intel.

Binary is always called agentos

The install script automatically renames the per-flavour binary to agentos. If installing manually, rename it yourself: mv agentos-pm agentos.

docs.title: 🖥️ Manual Install
docs.text:
If you prefer to install manually:

macOS (with admin)macOS (no admin)LinuxWindows 
# 1. Extract
tar xzf agentos_*_darwin_*.tar.gz

# 2. Move to PATH
sudo mv agentos /usr/local/bin/

# 3. Clear quarantine + sign
xattr -rd com.apple.quarantine /usr/local/bin/agentos
codesign --force --sign - /usr/local/bin/agentos

# 4. Verify
agentos version

No admin access? No problem — run it from any folder:

# 1. Extract
tar xzf agentos_*_darwin_*.tar.gz

# 2. Clear quarantine (no sudo needed on your own files)
xattr -rd com.apple.quarantine ./agentos
codesign --force --sign - ./agentos

# 3. Run directly
./agentos serve

Optional: add to your user PATH

mkdir -p ~/.local/bin
mv agentos ~/.local/bin/
echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.zshrc
source ~/.zshrc

macOS Gatekeeper

If you still see a security warning, go to System Settings → Privacy & Security and click "Allow Anyway" next to the AgentOS entry.

# 1. Extract
tar xzf agentos_*_linux_*.tar.gz

# 2. Move to PATH
sudo mv agentos /usr/local/bin/
sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/agentos

# 3. Verify
agentos version

Automatic (recommended):

# Download and run the installer (default: PM flavour)
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.bat -o install.bat
.\install.bat

# Choose a different flavour:
.\install.bat --flavour retail

Manual:

  1. Download the .zip for your flavour from the Releases Page
  2. Extract the archive
  3. Rename the binary: ren agentos-pm.exe agentos.exe
  4. (Optional) Move to a folder in your system Path
  5. Open PowerShell and run: 
    .\agentos.exe serve

docs.title: ⚙️ Initial Configuration
docs.text:
Once AgentOS is running, navigate to http://localhost:18080. All configuration can be done directly in the Web UI Settings panel (++cmd+comma++).

CLI Setup is Optional

You can also run agentos setup for terminal-based configuration, but the Web UI provides the same functionality with a premium visual interface.

docs.title: What you'll need:
docs.text:
• 🤖 AI Provider: Ollama (free, local) or an API key (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini).
  • 🐙 GitHub Token: For repository tracking (optional).
  • 🔑 License Key: Request a free beta key at info@unicolab.ai.

docs.title: 🔋 Background Service
docs.text:
Run AgentOS automatically on boot:

agentos serve --install-service

Next: Quick Start Guide →

docs.title: ⚡ Quick Start Guide
docs.text:
Follow this 5-minute guide to go from zero to your first AI-powered project insight.

Installation Guide Set up Ollama

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
Before you begin, ensure you have the core engine ready:

  • [x] AgentOS binary — Download your flavour (PM, Retail, or Office)
  • [x] AI Provider — Ollama (Local) or API Key (OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini)
  • [x] Source Access — GitHub personal access token (optional, but recommended)

One-Line Install

# Default (PM flavour)
curl -fsSL https://unicolab.github.io/agentos/install.sh | sh
# Or choose: --flavour retail / --flavour office

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
You can set up AgentOS in two ways: via the CLI or directly in the Web UI.

1 2 3 4

docs.title: Launch
docs.text: Double-click Start AgentOS.command (macOS) or Start AgentOS.bat (Windows), or run agentos serve in your terminal. Your dashboard opens at http://localhost:18080.

docs.title: Configure
docs.text: Either run agentos setup for an interactive CLI wizard, or skip it and go straight to the Settings panel in the Web UI to connect your agents.

docs.title: Track
docs.text: Create your first project in the Web UI. Link your GitHub repositories to let Jean-Pierre start indexing your workspace.

docs.title: Chat
docs.text: Open the chat sidebar and start talking. Ask for a standup, a risk assessment, or a summary of recent PRs.

docs.title: First Interaction
docs.text:
Once Jean-Pierre is connected, try these powerful prompts:

PM Workflows

  • "Give me a standup report for my active project"
  • "Analyze the biggest risks in the current sprint"
  • "Show me all open pull requests with no reviews"
  • "Summarize the last 24 hours of activity"

docs.title: Exploration
docs.text: Every card on the dashboard is interactive. Click "Ask JP" on any metric to get deep AI analysis of the underlying data.

docs.title: 🤖 Local AI
docs.text: Set up Ollama to run high-fidelity LLMs 100% locally. Ollama Guide →

docs.title: 🐙 GitHub Sync
docs.text: Deep-dive into multi-repo tracking and contributor metrics. GitHub Guide →

docs.title: 📋 Jira Integration
docs.text: Track sprints, epics, and WIP across your organization. Jira Guide →

docs.title: ⚙️ Full Reference
docs.text: Explore every CLI command and configuration option. CLI Reference →

docs.title: AIFlow Integration
docs.text:
🔄 Standalone Power · Centralized Intelligence

AgentOS works perfectly on its own — but when your organization scales, AIFlow transforms it into a centralized intelligence platform with advanced analytics, full observability, and agentic automation.

docs.title: 🏠 Standalone Mode — Complete Independence
docs.text:
AgentOS is a fully self-contained AI agent platform. It does not require AIFlow, a cloud service, or any external server to deliver its complete feature set:

Perfect for Solo Use

If you're a solo developer, freelancer, or small team lead, standalone mode gives you everything you need. No AIFlow subscription required.

docs.title: 🤖 Full AI Copilot
docs.text: Streaming chat, memory, tool calls, action chains — all features work locally without any external dependencies.

docs.title: 📊 Complete Dashboard
docs.text: 24-card bento-grid with Risk Radar, Velocity, Gantt, Leaderboard, Heatmaps — fully functional in standalone mode.

docs.title: 🐙 All Integrations
docs.text: GitHub, Jira, Slack — connect directly from your machine. No middleware, no proxy, no central server.

docs.title: 🔒 Maximum Privacy
docs.text: All data stays on your machine. Zero cloud dependency. The most private way to run your project intelligence.

docs.title: 🏢 When to Connect to AIFlow
docs.text:
As your organization grows, individual AgentOS instances become even more powerful when connected to AIFlow as a centralized sync hub. Consider connecting when:

👥 📊 🔍 🚀

docs.title: Multi-User Teams
docs.text: When multiple people run AgentOS across different projects and you want a unified organizational view of all project health.

docs.title: Cross-Project Analytics
docs.text: When you need to compare metrics across projects, identify organization-wide trends, and generate portfolio-level reports.

docs.title: Full Observability
docs.text: When you want real-time visibility into all agent activity, tool usage patterns, and AI decision-making across the entire organization.

docs.title: Agentic Automation
docs.text: When you're ready for next-level AI workflows — multi-agent orchestration, automated compliance sweeps, and intelligent process automation.

docs.title: 🔥 What AIFlow Adds
docs.text:
Connecting AgentOS instances to AIFlow unlocks a new tier of organizational intelligence:

Capability Standalone With AIFlow Project Intelligence ✅ Per-project dashboard 🚀 Cross-project portfolio analytics Risk Monitoring ✅ Per-project risk radar 🚀 Organization-wide risk heatmaps Reporting ✅ Local report generation 🚀 Centralized executive reports across all teams Observability ✅ Local action chain 🚀 Full audit trail and agent activity monitoring AI Workflows ✅ Single-agent tool calls 🚀 Multi-agent orchestration and flow automation Compliance ✅ Local project notes 🚀 Automated tech compliance sweeps and governance Team Insights ✅ Per-project leaderboard 🚀 Organization-wide contributor analytics Prevention ✅ Local risk alerts 🚀 Predictive risk prevention across your portfolio

docs.title: 📡 Centralized Sync Hub
docs.text: Each AgentOS instance pushes structured reports and metrics to AIFlow. The platform aggregates data from all nodes into a unified intelligence layer — without ever accessing your raw project data.

docs.title: 🔍 Full Observability
docs.text: AIFlow provides a real-time observability dashboard for all connected agents — tool usage, AI model performance, query patterns, response times, and decision trails.

docs.title: 🤖 Agentic Boosters
docs.text: Unlock multi-agent orchestration workflows: automated sprint planning across teams, cross-project dependency analysis, intelligent resource allocation, and autonomous compliance checks.

docs.title: 🛡️ Actionable Prevention
docs.text: AIFlow's analytics engine detects organizational risk patterns — burnout signals, velocity anomalies, and bottleneck formations — and triggers preventive recommendations before issues escalate.

docs.title: Architecture — Local Agent + Central Hub
docs.text:
┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐    ┌──────────────┐
  │  AgentOS #1  │    │  AgentOS #2  │    │  AgentOS #3  │
  │  Team Alpha  │    │  Team Beta   │    │  Team Gamma  │
  │  ┌────────┐  │    │  ┌────────┐  │    │  ┌────────┐  │
  │  │Local DB│  │    │  │Local DB│  │    │  │Local DB│  │
  │  └────────┘  │    │  └────────┘  │    │  └────────┘  │
  └──────┬───────┘    └──────┬───────┘    └──────┬───────┘
         │                   │                   │
         │    Structured Reports & Metrics Only  │
         └──────────────┬────┴───────────────────┘
                        │
                ┌───────▼────────┐
                │    AIFlow      │
                │  Central Hub   │
                │                │
                │  📊 Analytics  │
                │  🔍 Observ.   │
                │  🤖 Workflows │
                │  🛡️ Prevention│
                └────────────────┘

Privacy Preserved

Even when connected to AIFlow, your raw project data stays local. Only structured reports, aggregated metrics, and summaries are synced. Your code, conversations, and API keys never leave your machine.

docs.title: Configure
docs.text:
# ~/.agentos/config.yaml
aiflow_url: https://your-aiflow-instance.com
aiflow_token: your-api-token
aiflow_project_id: "project-uuid"   # optional

docs.title: Usage
docs.text:
• Ask JP: "Sync this report to AIFlow"
  • Use the AIFlow Sync button in the header bar
  • AI will push structured reports via aiflow_sync.push_report

Learn more about AIFlow Download AgentOS

docs.title: Background Service
docs.text: Run AgentOS as a persistent background service that starts automatically when you log in.

docs.title: Install as a Service
docs.text:
macOS (launchd)Linux (systemd)Windows 
agentos serve --install-service

This creates a launchd user agent that: - Starts automatically on login - Keeps AgentOS running in the background - Restarts automatically if it crashes - Accessible at http://localhost:18080

Manage the service: 

# Check status
launchctl list | grep agentos

# Stop
launchctl bootout gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.unicolab.agentos.plist

# Start
launchctl bootstrap gui/$(id -u) ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.unicolab.agentos.plist

# Uninstall
agentos serve --uninstall-service


agentos serve --install-service

Manage the service: 

# Check status
systemctl --user status agentos

# Stop
systemctl --user stop agentos

# Start
systemctl --user start agentos

# View logs
journalctl --user -u agentos -f

# Uninstall
agentos serve --uninstall-service

On Windows, simply add agentos.exe serve to your Startup folder:

  1. Press ++win+r++, type shell:startup, press Enter
  2. Create a shortcut to agentos.exe serve in this folder

Alternatively, run as a service using NSSM.

docs.title: Verify
docs.text:
After installing, close and reopen your terminal (or log out and back in), then:

# Check if it's running
curl http://localhost:18080/v1/health
# → {"status":"ok"}

Open your browser to http://localhost:18080 — AgentOS is always there.

docs.title: 🐙 GitHub Integration
docs.text:
Connect AgentOS to your GitHub repositories to track PRs, commits, issues, and contributor velocity in real-time.

Set Up Connectors

docs.title: 🔑 Security & Authentication
docs.text:
AgentOS uses Personal Access Tokens (classic) to communicate directly with GitHub's REST API. Your token is never shared with UnicoLab — it stays encrypted on your local machine.

1 2 3

docs.title: Generate Token
docs.text: Visit github.com/settings/tokens and create a new Classic token.

docs.title: Select Scopes
docs.text: Enable the repo scope (covers private repositories, PRs, and issues).

docs.title: Connect
docs.text: Copy the token and paste it into the Settings > Integrations > GitHub panel in the AgentOS Web UI.

docs.title: 📊 Mapping Your Workspace
docs.text: Once the connector is active, you can link repositories to your projects.

docs.title: Multi-Repo Aggregation
docs.text:
Jean-Pierre can track multiple repositories under a single project. This is perfect for microservices or mono-repo workflows where a single "product" spans several codebases.

Project Definition

  • Project: Core Engine
  • Repos: myorg/api, myorg/frontend, myorg/docs
  • Index Depth: 30 Days (Recommended)

docs.title: 🏗️ What Jean-Pierre Indexes
docs.text:
• Pull Requests: Status, review blockers, and long-running "stale" PRs.
  • Commits: Author velocity, heatmap activity, and codebase churn.
  • Issues: Label-based tracking and milestone progress.
  • Contributors: Active developers and contribution streaks.

docs.title: ⚡ Real-Time Webhooks (Advanced)
docs.text:
By default, AgentOS polls GitHub every few minutes. If you want instant updates, you can expose your local server (e.g., via ngrok) and set up a repository webhook pointing to:

http://your-domain.com:18080/v1/webhook/github

Next: Connect Jira →

docs.title: 📋 Jira Integration
docs.text:
Connect AgentOS to your Jira boards to track sprints, issues, epics, and team workload.

Set Up Connectors

docs.title: Create Token
docs.text: Visit id.atlassian.com and generate a new API token labeled "AgentOS".

docs.title: Authenticate
docs.text: Enter your Site URL (yourcompany.atlassian.net), your email, and the token in the Settings panel.

docs.title: Link Boards
docs.text: Add your Board IDs to your project configuration. Jean-Pierre will begin hydration immediately.

docs.title: 📊 Mapping Your Jira Boards
docs.text:
Finding your Board ID

Open your Jira board in a browser. The numerical value at the end of the URL (e.g., .../boards/42) is your Board ID.

docs.title: 🎨 Intelligence Delivered
docs.text:
Once connected, your dashboard is enriched with professional project metrics:

  • Sprint Status: Interactive WIP vs. Done progress rings.
  • Epic Tracker: Grouped issue views with roll-up progress bars.
  • Issue Mind Map: A visual dependency graph of your backlog.
  • Sprint Planner: AI-suggested milestones based on velocity.

Next: Connect Slack →

docs.title: 🤖 Ollama Setup — Free Local AI
docs.text:
Ollama is the recommended way to run AgentOS. It lets you run high-fidelity Large Language Models entirely on your machine with maximum privacy and zero recurring costs.

Download Ollama Next: Connect GitHub →

docs.title: macOS
docs.text: Download the macOS app or install via Homebrew: brew install ollama

docs.title: Linux
docs.text: One-line installer: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh

docs.title: Windows
docs.text: Download the .exe installer from the official site and follow the prompts.

docs.title: 🧠 Choice of Models
docs.text:
After installing, you need to "pull" a model. We've optimized Jean-Pierre for the Llama 3 family.

# Recommended for most users
ollama pull llama3.2

# For powerful workstations (M3 Max / RTX 4090)
ollama pull llama3.2:70b

# For ultra-lightweight performance
ollama pull llama3.2:1b

docs.title: Hardware Recommendations
docs.text: Model RAM Quality Best For Llama 3.2 (3b) 8GB ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Universal standard Mistral (7b) 16GB ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Alternative logic Llama 3.1 (70b) 48GB ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Executive reasoning

docs.title: ⚡ Connecting to AgentOS
docs.text:
Once Ollama is running (it stays in your system tray on macOS/Windows), simply tell AgentOS which flavor to use.

1 2

docs.title: Web UI
docs.text: Open Settings (++cmd+comma++), select Ollama as the provider, and pick your model from the dropdown.

docs.title: CLI
docs.text: Run agentos serve. The engine will auto-detect the local Ollama instance at http://localhost:11434.

docs.title: 🛠️ Performance Tuning
docs.text:
If the agent feels sluggish, ensure you have: 1. Model Matching: Don't run a 70B model on a MacBook Air. Stick to 3B or 7B. 2. GPU Acceleration: Ollama automatically uses WebGPU/Metal on macOS. On Linux/Windows, ensure your NVIDIA/AMD drivers are up to date. 3. Dedicated Resources: Close high-memory browser tabs or development servers if you're pushing larger models.

Back to Quick Start →

docs.title: 💬 Slack Integration
docs.text:
Send standup reports and automated notifications directly to your Slack channels.

Set Up Connectors

docs.title: Create App
docs.text: Visit api.slack.com and create a new app from scratch.

docs.title: Add Webhook
docs.text: Enable Incoming Webhooks and authorize a channel (e.g., #standups).

docs.title: Configure
docs.text: Paste the Webhook URL into the Settings > Integrations > Slack panel.

docs.title: 📢 Standup Delivery
docs.text: Generate a report and click "Send to Slack" to broadcast it to the team instantly.

docs.title: 🚨 Risk Alerts
docs.text: Configure automated pings for blockers, stale PRs, or critical sprint delays.

docs.title: 🧪 Exploration
docs.text:
Ask Jean-Pierre: "Send a standup report for the Web App project to Slack."

Back to Quick Start →

docs.title: API Endpoints
docs.text: AgentOS exposes a REST API for programmatic access. All endpoints are available at http://localhost:18080 when the server is running.

docs.title: Chat
docs.text: Method Endpoint Description POST /v1/chat/stream Streaming SSE chat with the agent

docs.title: Projects
docs.text: Method Endpoint Description GET /v1/projects List all projects GET /v1/projects/{id} Get project details GET /v1/projects/{id}/insights Full dashboard data (KPIs, charts, etc.) GET /v1/projects/{id}/prs/{num}/suggest-reviewer AI-powered reviewer suggestion GET /v1/projects/{id}/briefs Daily briefings POST /v1/projects/{id}/standup/send Send standup to Slack

docs.title: Fleet
docs.text: Method Endpoint Description GET /v1/fleet/summary Multi-project health overview

docs.title: Memory
docs.text: Method Endpoint Description PUT /v1/memory/{ns}/{key} Store a memory GET /v1/memory/{ns} Search memories by namespace POST /v1/memory/extract AI-extract memories from conversation

docs.title: Usage & Monitoring
docs.text: Method Endpoint Description GET /v1/usage LLM token usage + cost tracking DELETE /v1/usage Clear usage data GET /v1/health Health check

docs.title: Webhooks
docs.text: Method Endpoint Description POST /v1/webhook/github GitHub webhook receiver

docs.title: CLI Commands
docs.text: AgentOS provides a powerful command-line interface for all operations.

docs.title: Main Commands
docs.text:
agentos serve          # Start HTTP server + web UI (default)
agentos chat           # Interactive CLI chat session
agentos run "message"  # Execute a single message and exit
agentos setup          # Interactive first-time setup wizard
agentos config         # View/edit configuration
agentos projects       # Manage tracked projects
agentos license        # Check Watchtower license status
agentos version        # Print version, commit, and build date

docs.title: agentos serve
docs.text:
Start the HTTP API server with embedded web UI.

agentos serve                      # Default: http://localhost:18080
agentos serve --port 8080          # Custom port
agentos serve --no-open            # Don't auto-open browser
agentos serve --install-service    # Install as background service
agentos serve --uninstall-service  # Remove background service

docs.title: agentos chat
docs.text: Start an interactive CLI chat session with your agent.

docs.title: Slash Commands
docs.text: Command Description /help Show all commands /tools List available tools /models List available models /model <name> Switch model /sessions List active sessions /session <id> Switch session /new Start a new session /memory Show agent memory /forget Clear agent memory /history Show recent runs /events <id> Show events for a run /license Show license status /feedback Submit feedback /bugreport Report a bug /clear Clear screen /quit Exit

docs.title: agentos setup
docs.text:
Interactive wizard for first-time configuration. Walks you through:

  1. AI provider selection and configuration
  2. GitHub token setup
  3. Jira credentials (optional)
  4. License key entry

docs.title: agentos version
docs.text:
$ agentos version
Jean-Pierre v0.8.1 (abc1234) built 2026-03-10T12:00:00Z
Pack: aiflow-pm (Jean-Pierre — The PM 🎩)
License: 🟢 enterprise (active) [3/10 seats]

docs.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
docs.text: Master these shortcuts to navigate AgentOS like a pro.

docs.title: Global Shortcuts
docs.text: Shortcut Action ++cmd+k++ Open Command Palette ++cmd+m++ Open JP Memory panel ++cmd+n++ New chat session ++cmd+t++ Tool Explorer ++cmd+comma++ Provider Settings ++cmd+r++ Refresh dashboard data ++slash++ Focus chat input ++question++ Show keyboard shortcuts reference ++escape++ Close any open panel
